summary:
Claim: High BCG vaccination coverage leads to poor tuberculin test interpretation.  
Evidence: - BCG induces immune memory causing false positives via cross-reactivity with environmental mycobacteria. - False positives reduce diagnostic accuracy and increase risk of inappropriate treatment.  
Answer: A
